resources.string: Help Desk has paused the Cruzr voice assistant. Speak anytime — I am listening.
Cruzr robot services are unavailable. Topic buttons still work.
Speech is unavailable. Topic buttons still work.
Listening… speak clearly, then wait for a response.
Listening… speak your question, then pause.
Speaking… say something or tap Interrupt to stop me.
Stopped. Listening for your next question.
Listening paused. Tap Listen to resume.
Microphone permission is required for voice questions.
Pausing voice assistant and taking the microphone…
Voice assistant still active — retrying microphone access…
Could not take over speech recognition. Try again in a moment.
Speak your question, or choose a topic below.
Speech recognition failed. Try again or tap a topic.
The Cruzr voice assistant is still using the microphone. Wait a moment, or use a topic button instead.
No speech was detected. Please try again.
